name: Codex Desktop
notes: OpenAI-signed, hardened, and notarized — Electron with node-inspect fuse ON.
Apply route: relaunch with --remote-debugging-port + CDP inject of payload-v2 (generic mode). No copy/patch/re-sign.
payload-v2 generic mode: body root + plaintext on p/li/markdown classes + careful Hebrew leaf span stamping (.ortl-leaf).
Experimental/opt-in: debug port stays open on 127.0.0.1 for the session. Not marketed as fully supported.
